Name.description: The name of the access point.

Bucket.description: The name of the bucket associated with the access point.

NetworkOrigin.description: Indicates whether this access point allows access from the public internet.

CreationDate.description: The date and time when the access point was created.

Alias.description: The alias for the access point.

AccessPointArn.description: The ARN for the access point.

BucketAccountId.description: The AWS account ID associated with the S3 bucket.
